calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Deutsche Bank National is present.
Attorney, Robert Cohen, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Patricia Riveria, Ariel Camacho, and Vicente Camacho are present.
Attorney, Nathaniel Bigger, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Amanda Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-07-2010 is vacated.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT F. COHEN, TEL. NO. 1-800-492-2657 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
VICENTE LUIS CAMACHO, DEFENDANT APPERING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAVE RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HOLDOVER DAMAGES BASED ON THEIR DECLARATION AS TO PAST INFESTATIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
